info.name: hotel-sim · Scoped Payment Flow (room-on-auth + spa-upfront)
info.description:
Drives the FULL payment lifecycle end-to-end — scoped link/auth, capture,
IMMEDIATE settle, folio completion, refund, and cancellation:

  * The ROOM line sits on a held MANUAL authorisation (a card imprint at
    check-in), then is CAPTURED at checkout (folder 08) — revenue posts on
    capture, not auth.
  * The SPA line is added AFTER the room auth and settled by its OWN,
    SEPARATE, IMMEDIATE payment, scoped to the spa line via lineCoverage
    (WHK-016 / payment_line).
  * Scoped allocation lands each payment's revenue on its OWN line — the room
    line's revenuePosted stays 0 until its capture lands (auth != revenue).
  * The F&B folio is paid IMMEDIATE (folder 09); both folios are then completed
    via completeLine + completeFolio (folder 10, incl. an idempotent re-complete
    that returns 200, not 409).
  * A partial REFUND of the captured spa payment (folder 11) drops netRevenue
    but leaves customerOwes at 0 (RX-003: refund reduces net, not settlement).
  * A CANCELLATION probe (folder 12) mints a fresh uncaptured MANUAL auth and
    cancels it — no ledger reversal results (INV-006: cancel of an uncaptured
    auth posts nothing).

ASYNC SETTLEMENT PATTERN
  capture/cancel/refund are asynchronous: the core-api action returns 202 and
  drives the PSP over HTTP; payments-sim self-emits the settlement webhook back
  to core-api off-thread, and the per-line ledger posting (revenuePosted) lands
  via the outbox poller (~5s). So each lifecycle step calls the core-api action
  (202), then POLLS the payment/folio (setNextRequest + ~1s delay, bounded)
  until the terminal state (status + revenuePosted), then asserts. Terminal
  state is NEVER asserted on the 202 response.

  NOTE: there is deliberately NO /v1/test capture|cancel|refund trigger step —
  the real PSP endpoints (driven by the core-api action) self-emit those
  webhooks, so a /v1/test trigger would 409 (NO_CAPTURE_QUEUED). The /v1/test
  AUTHORISE trigger IS used (folders 02/04/09/12): there is no core-api
  'authorise' action, so it stands in for the deferred pay-web customer
  checkout, and ?sync=true delivers the AUTHORISATION (+CAPTURE for IMMEDIATE)
  webhook inline.

NEGATIVE PROBES (pass-as-designed): capture without X-Human-Auth -> 4xx;
  completeFolio while a line is still ACTIVE -> 409; lineCoverage not summing
  to amount -> 400; payment without X-Human-Auth -> 4xx.

PREREQUISITES
  1. core-api on {{baseUrl}}, payments-sim on {{pspBaseUrl}}, brought up under
     the smoke overlay so the test-trigger router is live:
       docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.smoke.yml up
     (the overlay sets SPRING_PROFILES_ACTIVE=test on payments-sim, so
     /v1/test/... is reachable — it stands in for the deferred pay-web checkout).
  2. Products seeded:
       docker compose exec -T db psql -U hotelops -d hotelops < seed-products.sql
     (ROOM 1111… £180/night, SPA 3333… Couples Massage £80, FNB 5555… Dinner
     £45/cover, 40 covers.)

Run the whole collection top-to-bottom (Collection Runner or Newman). Variables
chain automatically. Allow ~15-20s — the lifecycle folders poll for async
settlement (run a fresh DB volume to avoid accumulated-inventory drift).

Money is minor units (pence). Room £180 x 3 nights = 54000. Spa £80 = 8000.
F&B £45 x 2 covers = 9000. Partial refund = 3000.

item.name: 00 · Health
Actuator health (core-api up)
01 · Setup — customer + folio + room line
1 · Create customer (John Patel)
2 · Open empty folio (booking)

exec: pm.test('booking PENDING with no lines', () => pm.expect(f.status).to.eql('PENDING'));

item.name: 3 · Add ROOM line (3 nights, £540)

exec: pm.test('room line revenuePosted 0 (nothing settled yet)', () => pm.expect(room.revenuePosted).to.eql(0));

item.name: 02 · Room on a held auth (MANUAL, never captured here)
1 · Create ROOM payment link (MANUAL, scoped to room line)
2 · [SIM] Customer authorises room link (pay-web stand-in)
3 · Get room payment — expect AUTHORISED (held, not captured)
4 · Get folio — auth secured, NOTHING captured
03 · Spa added later (the gap opens)
1 · Add SPA line (£80) AFTER the room auth
2 · Get folio — total grows, auth does NOT (the gap)
04 · Settle spa upfront — own IMMEDIATE scoped charge
1 · Create SPA payment (IMMEDIATE, scoped to spa line)
2 · [SIM] Customer pays spa link (IMMEDIATE → auth+capture chain)
3 · Get spa payment — expect CAPTURED
05 · PROOF — scoped allocation landed on the spa line only
1 · Get folio — spa settled, room still just held

exec: // Ledger postings (revenuePosted) land via the outbox poller (~5s), so poll the folio.
// THE PROOF: spa revenue went to the SPA line, not the room line that sorts first.
pm.test('ROOM line revenuePosted == 0 (held auth, not captured)', () => pm.expect(room.revenuePosted).to.eql(0));
pm.test('amountAuthorised == 62000 (D3 sums all payments: room 54000 held + spa 8000 auth+captured)', () => pm.expect(f.amountAuthorised).to.eql(62000));
pm.test('booking still CONFIRMED (no completion yet)', () => pm.expect(f.status).to.eql('CONFIRMED'));

item.name: 06 · Guardrail probes (expected failures)
Payment without X-Human-Auth → rejected (gate)
lineCoverage not summing to amount → 400

exec: pm.test('400 — coverage must sum to amount', () => pm.response.to.have.status(400));

item.name: 07 · F&B booking thread (vertical wired via the generic endpoints)
1 · Availability — F&B covers + price (DINNER seed)

exec: pm.test('no roomAttributes (not a Room)', () => pm.expect(fnb.roomAttributes == null).to.be.true);

item.name: 2 · Create customer (Frank Diner)
3 · Open empty folio (booking)

exec: pm.test('booking PENDING with no lines', () => pm.expect(f.status).to.eql('PENDING'));

item.name: 4 · Add F&B line (2 covers, £90)

exec: pm.test('F&B line is base × quantity = 9000 (no nights factor)', () => pm.expect(fnb.lineAmount).to.eql(9000));

item.name: 5 · Get folio — F&B line landed via the generic path

exec: pm.test('priced base × quantity (9000), no nights factor', () => pm.expect(fnb.lineAmount).to.eql(9000));

item.name: 08 · Capture the room (MANUAL → revenue posts on capture)
1 · Request capture of the room auth (202, async)

exec: pm.test('202 Accepted (capture requested; PSP self-emits the CAPTURE webhook)', () => pm.response.to.have.status(202));
// Do NOT assert CAPTURED here — settlement lands async on the self-emitted webhook (Trap A).

item.name: 2 · Poll room payment until CAPTURED

exec: pm.test('status CAPTURED after self-emitted webhook', () => pm.expect(p.status).to.eql('CAPTURED'));

item.name: 3 · Poll folio until ROOM revenue posts (0 → 54000)
4 · [NEG] Capture without X-Human-Auth → rejected (gate)
09 · Pay the F&B folio (IMMEDIATE → captured in one step)
1 · Create F&B payment (IMMEDIATE, scoped to F&B line)
2 · [SIM] Customer pays F&B link (IMMEDIATE → auth+capture chain)
3 · Get F&B payment — expect CAPTURED
4 · Poll F&B folio until line revenue posts (9000)
10 · Complete the folios (lines → folio; idempotent re-complete)
1 · [NEG] completeFolio while lines still ACTIVE → 409 (C1)

exec: pm.test('409 — not completable while a line is ACTIVE', () => pm.response.to.have.status(409));

item.name: 2 · Complete the ROOM line (ungated — no X-Human-Auth)
3 · Complete the SPA line (ungated — no X-Human-Auth)
4 · completeFolio (gated) → COMPLETED
5 · [IDEMPOTENT] Re-complete the same folio → 200, not 409
6 · Complete the F&B line (ungated)
7 · completeFolio the F&B booking (gated) → COMPLETED
11 · Refund probe (partial — net drops, owes unchanged)
1 · Request partial refund of the spa payment (202, async)

exec: pm.test('202 Accepted (refund requested; PSP self-emits the REFUND webhook)', () => pm.response.to.have.status(202));

item.name: 2 · Poll spa payment until refund settles (REFUNDED)

exec: const settled = pm.response.code === 200 && p.amountRefunded === 3000 && refund && refund.status === 'REFUNDED';

item.name: 3 · Poll folio until refund reflected (net drops, owes unchanged — RX-003)

exec: pm.test('customerOwes STILL 0 (refund reduces net, not settlement)', () => pm.expect(f.customerOwes).to.eql(0));

item.name: 12 · Cancel probe (fresh uncaptured MANUAL auth → no posting)
1 · Open a throwaway booking (same customer)
2 · Add a SPA line at a non-overlapping window
3 · Create a MANUAL payment (scoped to the throwaway line)
4 · [SIM] Authorise the link (MANUAL → AUTHORISED, not captured)
5 · Get payment — expect AUTHORISED (held, uncaptured)
6 · Request cancellation (gated, 202 async)

exec: pm.test('202 Accepted (cancel requested; PSP self-emits the CANCELLATION webhook)', () => pm.response.to.have.status(202));

item.name: 7 · Poll payment until CANCELLED

exec: pm.test('status CANCELLED after self-emitted webhook', () => pm.expect(p.status).to.eql('CANCELLED'));

item.name: 8 · PROOF — no ledger posting from a cancelled auth (INV-006)

exec: pm.test('netRevenue == 0 (no reversal — nothing was posted)', () => pm.expect(f.netRevenue).to.eql(0));
